requiredFindings.summary: The patch blocks only one dangerous domain string while keeping ordinary objects for untrusted indexes.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Other magic keys or nested path/name keys can still interact with object prototypes, and future variants will bypass the blacklist.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Use Object.create(null) or Map for every index layer and validate the published PoC plus variant keys.

requiredFindings.summary: The test covers only __proto__ as domain.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Prototype pollution defenses need variant and nested-key tests.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add tests for constructor, prototype, path/name keys, and rejectPublicSuffixes:false scenarios.
